text: I feel a faint sense of anticipation standing at the threshold of this clean, modern space. The fire extinguisher and emergency signs remind me of safety and preparedness, while the angled perspective adds a sense of wonder and displacement. As I move into the vibrant, information-rich environment of the research and development exhibit, curiosity swells within me. The bold colors and stimulating displays grapple for my attention, inviting me to reflect on the nature of innovation and our relationship with technology. I feel both inspired and contemplative—caught between the clinical exterior and the creative interior, eager to explore what new ideas wait to be discovered.
